tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(30, 30, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(30, 30, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(30, 30, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
